name: Lust
image_description: The unadorned figure is the object of desire, the fiery volcano symbolizes Aries' sudden outburst of energy. The chameleon changes color to become whatever is required in order to achieve its aims.
personal: Someone with the Venus/Aries combination of love and self-will demands a great deal of personal attention and will compete in partnership matters with enormous enthusiasm. Willful, unstable, affectionate and imbued with a healthy lust for love and life, people with this planet/sign combination are impulsive in matters of relationships and good taste: what, or who Venus Arians choose, they are determined to get. These personality types are cheerful and positive, and have great enthusiasm and sparkle. Their warm-hearted, pleasant and friendly nature wins many loyal friends and guarantees loyalty in return. Socially, Venus Arians are comfortable and competent, with a manner that carries them successfully through most tricky situations. With these qualities, they can make good business and romantic contacts: competitive instincts make the Venus Arians want the best – and the best they will have. As with all Venus aspects, this card suggests some artistic creativity. If these fiery Venusians are not artistic themselves, they will have the ability to surround themselves with artistic and talented friends. Appearances are important to Venus Arians, and they take a great deal of trouble to look good wherever they see themselves on show.
reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates a need to assert oneself – and yet to do this with the utmost warmth and charm. The hard hand in a velvet glove may be the answer.
events: A brief wild love affair; a love battle, a fighting sparring relationship, a love challenge.

name: Romance
image_description: A romantic image of a happy and devoted young couple who dance accompanied by Cupid. This represents love, beauty, art and romance in its most ideal form.
personal: Here, Venus sits in its natural sign, Taurus. The green planet and the green sign are both concerned with the beautiful, pleasurable things in life, and this card indicates affections that are constant, lasting and stable. Venus Taureans love comfort, luxury and beautiful surroundings, and direct their attention to achieving them – for this character, social status is based on wealth or artistic ability. People with this planet/sign combination are possessive and happy to be possessed themselves, though, with their undoubted moneymaking skills, can take this to extremes, becoming over-indulgent and greedy. Venus Taureans are good with physical and sensual contact, and for this reason do not just make good lovers, they can extend their talents to the hands-on arts. Modeling and sculpture come easy to the natives of this planet/sign aspect, who have an expert feeling for the value of material things. Many singers have this Venus placing, and even Venus Taureans not blessed with this talent usually have a pleasing voice. Venus Taureans are great romantics, but consider a little opulence better than love in a garret, and can be wildly extravagant when impressing a loved one.
reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it usually indicates for the questioner a pleasurable forthcoming event, probably with a little monetary gain attached. The best business-relationship bet will succeed if concerned with one of the arts.
events: A love affair, a fortunate marriage, living happily in comfort, gaining through a love relationship; a windfall or gift from someone close.

name: Flattery
image_description: The god Janus whose two faces look towards past and future. Here, it symbolizes the Gemini quality of talking to one person while listening to another's conversation. The spreading plant suggests the multiplicity of the Venus in Gemini nature.
personal: Venus Geminians need variety in their romantic life. If they have to settle down (and they are not the best people to do this), it must be with someone as changeable as them. Friends with everyone, they can maintain devotion to one person as long as the conversation and wit flows readily. Good, stimulating conversation with loved ones and friends is of paramount importance to the people this card describes: Venus/Gemini types do need, also, a great deal of freedom, and tend to spread their affections. With a versatile ability to be all things to all people, there is a tendency for people with this planet/sign combination to say things for the sake of winning attention. Indeed, words are of more importance than deeds to the Venus Geminian, and the smooth tongue and the cleverly phrased compliment may become a well-used and manipulative talent. Never averse to telling little white lies in order to smooth the pathway to better things, they flatter and cajole to make life more pleasing. A love for literature, art and creative work means that Venus/Gemini people seek out friends with connections in these fields. In fact, such characters probably have talent in these directions themselves.
reading: When this card shows up in a reading, it usually indicates to the questioner that a little amenable smooth talk will achieve far more in the current situation than a competitive wrangle.
events: A secret love affair, an imagined romance, two lovers at a time, a deceptive courtship; constant need for company.

name: Birth
image_description: The angel of birth above a newborn baby. The rocky cavern suggests the hard, protective shell of Cancer. Above, the Sun and Moon safeguard the birth. The two sigils represent the Seal of Venus and the Spirit of Venus.
personal: The Venus/Cancer combination describes someone with deeply sensitive romantic feelings. People with this planet/sign aspect need stability and security in relationships, and demonstrable shows of affection are essential to their well-being. They care for the loved ones and things around them, and expect to be equally cherished in return. With Venus in this sign, the inevitable result of a perfect liaison would be to set up home and produce a family. The desire to feed, protect and nurture a happy home of children is foremost with this card. The home will be comfortably cluttered, as possessions are kept and cared for in the same way as family. Venus/Cancer personality types are good entertainers in their own home, and having friends to visit is an important part of their home life. They spend time and care on making their environment look and feel aesthetically comfortable. The same goes for the garden, and the Venus/Cancer combination is an indication of quite good taste in matters of interior and exterior style. The negative side of this combination is that the person described can become overpoweringly smothering and possessive.
reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it may indicate a birth or other addition to the family. It can also show a need to make contact with one's mother or more general family roots in order to discover the answer to the question asked.
events: The birth of a child, an adoption or increase in the family; celebration of an anniversary; a reunion with childhood friends.

name: Affair
image_description: Two cherubs caress; they are adults acting as children. It is a scene of innocent and irresponsible love of life and pleasure. Above, stars and hearts fly like a fantasy firework show.
personal: Where affections are concerned, Venus Leos are ardent, warm-hearted and dramatic. Their natural approach is lavish, generous and usually over-the-top – they live life to the full, and what style they have when they feel positive! Born romantic, Venus lions prefer situations full of drama and excitement, and what could be more attractive than the flirtatious thrill of a full-blown love affair. Despite having a tendency to stray and succumb to generous flattery, people with this planet/sign combination are strongly loyal to those lucky enough to earn their affections. Pleasure and luxury are vital to Venus Leos if they are to retain their naturally sunny outlook. Any relationship must contain vast amounts of admiration and adoration – in both directions – and then all is well. Without this mutual admiration, we find one grumpy old lion snarling at everyone. With Leo being the creative sign, the arts will be important in the life of Venus Leos, and it is likely that they have a special talent in this direction. They feel a great need to be involved with artistic or creative endeavors, even if only as an entrepreneur directing operations. Children will be prominent in any Leo life, and it is easy for them to let their hair down and make good friends among the very youngest.
reading: In a reading, this card shows that a new stimulus to creative endeavors will enter the life of the questioner. The card may suggest a new craze or interest, even a new love.
events: A deep dramatic love affair; a showy lifestyle, excessive luxury and extravagance; show business.

name: Discrimination
image_description: A woman, her hair garlanded, walks barefoot in the neat countryside. She reaches out towards the many butterflies. A small fox barks. Virgo cares for and rules smaller, more delicate creatures.
personal: For Venus/Virgo types romantically, it is important that partners share their intellectual interests. People with this planet/sign combination may be in danger of analyzing their emotions to excess, though when positively directed, this ability can be helpful to others in the form of relationship counseling. Their close friends are few, but selectively chosen. The Venus/Virgo personality type shows great discrimination in choosing on whom and what to bestow their affections. When this is taken to extremes in a negative way, it can make them downright picky about potential friends and lovers. In many areas of life, however, this fastidious attitude stands this personality type in good stead. With a little more Venus extravagance added to the careful Virgo temperament, this person will make an excellent cook. Something to do with nourishment, pleasure and Virgo perfectionism combines to make a great but ever-modest chef or host. Virgos always show love in practical ways. Many of their social activities or romantic interests revolve around work or health. They may also be involved with artistic or alternative pursuits. It is important that the work surroundings of the Venus/Virgoan are harmonious and beautiful, or life can get twitchy. They display good taste in clothes, and this aspect features in the birth charts of many fashion designers.
reading: When this card is picked, it shows the need to be ultra-selective, using all powers of discretion to attain aims.
events: A close friendship that may develop further; a total makeover; a love affair with someone at work.

name: Indecision
image_description: Libra lies between the gentle perfection of Virgo and the dramatic emotions of Scorpio. The constellation of the virgin contrasts with the sting of the scorpion. The hourglass shows time, representing the eternal Libran dilemma in finalizing a decision.
personal: In Libra, Venus is at home, as this is the sign she rules in company with Taurus. Whereas Taurus is concerned with the pleasure of material possessions, for Libra, people are of utmost importance. All Librans work hard at keeping their relationships harmonious and balanced. Sociable and popular, they do most things best in teamwork and partnerships. Environment is important to people with this personality type, too: even on a limited budget they are able to make their home surroundings tasteful and pleasant. A love of harmony taken to extreme, however, can lead to a constant attitude of giving-in to achieve peace, and given too many alternatives in matters of relationships, the Venus Libran will waffle interminably before making a decision. Fortunately, people with this combination usually make a very happy marriage, often with someone they can look on as both friend and lover. The social abilities of Venus Librans provide them with good opportunities for dealing with the public, and work in liaison and personnel areas could be profitable. This planet/sign combination also has a very strong link with the world of music and with musicians.
reading: If this card is drawn, it suggests that the questioner has come to a stage at which a decision is imperative. There has been much dithering back and forth over an important matter, and now the time has come to be firm and take the consequences.
events: A large social gathering, a wedding; a difficult decision to make; a business partnership in the arts, an artist lover.

name: Secrets
image_description: The inscrutable winged sphinx – the head of a ram indicating the Martian link with the sign of Aries – is a symbol of the deep secrets of the past. Surrounding the sphinx are knots, glyphs and keys to many mysteries.
personal: In matters of love, Venus in Scorpio is the hot-house. In the opposite sign to its natural home, Taurus, the gentle nature of Venus becomes an emotional fireball. In romantic life, people with this planet/sign aspect are passionate, loyal and strongly sexed. Their reactions are emotional and desires are intense; they are also secretive, and do not talk about their inner emotional life easily. This card describes someone who idealizes friends and loved ones, and makes sacrifices for them without a second thought. Let-downs can turn all this to cold indifference – even vindictiveness with the extreme nature of this personality. The artistic side of Venus in Scorpio can manifest in strong dramatic contrasts. Often, it indicates interest in the inner mysteries and occult arts. There is a suggestion of financial gain through marriage or partnership with this card; it can also hint at an inheritance. On occasions, this placing of Venus reveals a highly sensuous nature or over-emphasis on sex. The sexual drive of Venus Scorpios is powerful, and if not overly sensuous, they do best with a creative outlet for that pent-up energy. Often, this combination indicates the withdrawal of emotional response over a long time, perhaps in a period of celibacy.
reading: When one receives this card in a reading, it usually indicates that a deep secret is being held by the questioner or is being hidden from them by someone very close.
events: A secret liaison, a secret love, a passionate love affair; money comes to a partner, a shared inheritance; an expression of extreme jealousy.

name: Flirtation
image_description: A traveling minstrel serenades a beautiful young huntress. The lute symbolizes the pleasure-loving nature of Venus, and the bow the far-seeking adventurousness of Sagittarius.
personal: When Venus is in Sagittarius, it describes someone who is philosophical and fair, honest and true in relationships. In contrast to the nature of the preceding sign, Venus in Scorpio (see page 77) which is secretive and brooding, Sagittarius is open and free-speaking with regard to love matters. Venus Sagittarians share all thoughts with a loved one, even if sometimes they are a little too frank for comfort. Speaking the truth as they see it, they constantly have to be cautious that their honesty is not just too blunt. Venus Sagittarians are loyal, but need plenty of freedom within a relationship, and allow this to their partners, too. Saying what they think makes for a great deal of flirtatious conversation, which titillates the Sagittarian love of adventure. Close relationships with people from abroad are indicated by this card, and people with this aspect are attracted to the learned or worldly wise. In love, their ideals are high, and they might spend time trying to convert loved ones to their personal philosophy. Religious thought and action, in the broadest sense, could be prominent.
reading: There is, when this card is selected in a reading, a possibility of marriage or a relationship with someone from another country. Often, this comes through a meeting at a university or other learning institution. Women who choose this card usually seek a heroic, adventurous kind of partner – a romantic Indiana Jones figure.
events: A foreign lover or holiday romance that blossoms, a marriage abroad; a light-hearted flirtation just for the adventure.

name: Convention
image_description: A neat and well-cared-for traditional house stands proudly above an orderly garden. In the center is a child framed by a stone wall. A portrait of a child framed by a stone wall indicates family restrictions.
personal: Venus in the common-sense sign of Capricorn describes someone who needs a romantic partner to share and help them achieve ambitions. Disliking public displays of emotion, this planet/sign type is fairly conservative in behavior. Although this sounds dull, the Capricornian zany sense of humor prevails, keeping any relationship lively and entertaining. Often, the Venus in Capricorn card indicates a fair age difference in a major relationship. People with this aspect are loyal and steadfast, for financial security is very important to their emotional happiness. Love on an overdraft is not conducive to a Capricornian's well-being, and relationships can suffer if the partner is recklessly extravagant or foolish with money. There is always, with this sign, a strong social and artistic ambition. Venus Capricornians like to know and be known by the talented and successful. Their involvement in the arts world could be based on their own talents or be concerned with exploiting the creative abilities of others. The Venus/Capricorn love of artistic things usually leans toward the more conventional, expressing itself in classical music and traditional arts. The Venus/Capricorn type has good feelings for business dealings with the opposite sex, and harmony in this area is important to their life ambitions.
reading: When this card is chosen, it often indicates a romantic liaison with someone much older or younger.
events: A marriage or affair with a great age difference; a relationship with a famous or important person, a new friend of some influence.

name: Detachment
image_description: An intelligent person looks ahead with detached interest. The cranium is marked with a phrenological map showing areas of intellect. He is immersed in thought, unaware of the idyllic scene behind. The sea represents emotions.
personal: Basically, Aquarius/Venus people like to be friendly with everyone – but not too friendly. Not the most stable of partners, if, nevertheless, they find a stimulating and sociable relationship that allows them adequate freedom, in not too traditional a way, they will stick with it tenaciously. Plenty of intellectual stimulation is important for this planet/sign personality. They dislike jealousy and over-possessiveness, and soon tire of romantic partners who seek to encroach on their social freedom. Their taste inclines towards the unusual, with innovative art taking pride of place. Sexually they can in some cases be somewhat eccentric and promiscuous. Many of the acquaintances, friends and loved ones of Venus Aquarians will be creative and artistic. In long-term partnerships, they are more likely to marry someone who has been a good friend for quite a while. In fact friends becoming lovers and lovers becoming friends fit easily with their unconventional social attitude. People with this aspect flourish in group activities, especially where the group concerned is involved with an ideal or a particularly avant-garde philosophy. These are the people who can live quite easily in an ashram or commune.
reading: When this card is drawn in a reading it may indicate a detached feeling with regard to one's relationship. Negatively, it can mean that there is no means of making contact.
events: A sudden love affair with a friend; an unusual free-love relationship, an unusual or odd relationship; a couple living separate lives; an agreement between lovers.

name: Submission
image_description: A bird in a beautiful cage is placed in a decoratively draped window. Outside in the sky appearing as the sun is the glyph of Venus. The door of the cage is open, but the bird remains inside.
personal: Venus/Pisces types are highly sensitive and imaginatively romantic: they can invent their own reality with regard to friends and loved ones. People with this planet/sign combination need physical demonstrations of love in regular doses, and are therefore susceptible to being fooled by insincerity. Some kind of artistic talent is usually indicated by this planet/sign aspect: it will blossom in a sensitive and appreciative environment. This higher dimension of the sign Pisces can manifest as a great talent for inspired artistic, poetic or musical works. With this gift, such people are able to tap into the universal unconscious, achieving great public success and expressing the spirit of their time. Highly sensitive and imaginatively romantic, they can idealize their loved ones. It would not be surprising if they had a fantasy or secret love or lover at some time in life. The Venus Piscean's underlying kindness towards, and sympathy with, others, constantly demands someone or something on which to be lavished. However, people with this personality type are extremely vulnerable to emotional bullies, so need to be extra-selective with their compassion.
reading: Often when this card is drawn, it indicates a social shyness that leads to isolation and romantic frustration. This in turn may cause feelings of martyrdom and become sublimated into religious or spiritual expression. For some people, though, it can represent a genuine love of solitude and quiet.
events: Feeling caught in a love trap; giving in for a quiet life, staying in an awkward situation easily left.
